title: Sea Turtle Nesting Season: A Guide to SWFL's Most Magical Beaches
excerpt: From Lovers Key to Barefoot Beach, Southwest Florida's coastline comes alive each summer as loggerhead and green sea turtles return to nest — here's how to experience it responsibly.
igCaption:
Sea Turtle Nesting Season: A Guide to SWFL's Most Magical Beaches

From Lovers Key to Barefoot Beach, Southwest Florida's coastline comes alive each summer as loggerhead and green sea turtles return to nest — here's how to experience it responsibly.
